dashboard.label: TrustOps — Synthetic Auth & Decisions
dashboard.description: Phase 1 dashboard for VPN/auth visibility and analyst decision telemetry.

search.query: index=trustops sourcetype="trustops:auth" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,user,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | rex field=_raw "^(?<timestamp>[^,]+),(?<user>[^,]+),(?<src_ip>[^,]+),(?<dest_host>[^,]+),(?<action>[^,]+),(?<geo_country>[^,]+),(?<auth_method>[^,]+),(?<risk_score>\d+),(?<event_type>[^,]+),(?<alert_id>[^,]*),(?<scenario>[^,\r\n]+)" | where scenario="vpn_brute_then_geo_anomaly" | eval _time=strptime(timestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | timechart span=5m count by action

index=trustops sourcetype="trustops:auth" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,user,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | rex field=_raw "^(?<timestamp>[^,]+),(?<user>[^,]+),(?<src_ip>[^,]+),(?<dest_host>[^,]+),(?<action>[^,]+),(?<geo_country>[^,]+),(?<auth_method>[^,]+),(?<risk_score>\d+),(?<event_type>[^,]+),(?<alert_id>[^,]*),(?<scenario>[^,\r\n]+)" | where action="failure" | stats count as failed_logins by user | sort - failed_logins

index=trustops sourcetype="trustops:auth" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,user,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | rex field=_raw "^(?<timestamp>[^,]+),(?<user>[^,]+),(?<src_ip>[^,]+),(?<dest_host>[^,]+),(?<action>[^,]+),(?<geo_country>[^,]+),(?<auth_method>[^,]+),(?<risk_score>\d+),(?<event_type>[^,]+),(?<alert_id>[^,]*),(?<scenario>[^,\r\n]+)" | eval risk_score_num=tonumber(risk_score) | where risk_score_num>=40 OR scenario!="normal_baseline" | stats values(user) as users max(risk_score_num) as max_risk dc(geo_country) as geo_variety by src_ip | sort - max_risk

index=trustops sourcetype="trustops:auth" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,user,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | rex field=_raw "^(?<timestamp>[^,]+),(?<user>[^,]+),(?<src_ip>[^,]+),(?<dest_host>[^,]+),(?<action>[^,]+),(?<geo_country>[^,]+),(?<auth_method>[^,]+),(?<risk_score>\d+),(?<event_type>[^,]+),(?<alert_id>[^,]*),(?<scenario>[^,\r\n]+)" | stats max(tonumber(risk_score)) as max_risk_score by user | sort - max_risk_score

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | eval _cols=split(_raw,",") | eval _nf=mvcount(_cols) | eval ai_recommendation_status=mvindex(_cols,9) | eval confidence_score=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,6)) | eval trust_score=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,7)) | eval time_to_decision_seconds=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,8)) | eval automation_bias_risk_score=tonumber(if(_nf>16,mvindex(_cols,16),null())) | stats count as decisions avg(confidence_score) as avg_confidence avg(trust_score) as avg_trust avg(time_to_decision_seconds) as avg_time_to_decision avg(automation_bias_risk_score) as avg_bias_risk by ai_recommendation_status | sort ai_recommendation_status

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | eval _cols=split(_raw,",") | eval _nf=mvcount(_cols) | eval analyst=mvindex(_cols,2) | eval automation_bias_risk_score=tonumber(if(_nf>16,mvindex(_cols,16),null())) | eval automation_bias_risk_level=if(_nf>17,mvindex(_cols,17),"") | where isnotnull(automation_bias_risk_score) | stats avg(automation_bias_risk_score) as avg_bias_risk count as decisions values(automation_bias_risk_level) as risk_levels by analyst | sort - avg_bias_risk

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | eval _cols=split(_raw,",") | eval _nf=mvcount(_cols) | eval evidence_reviewed_count=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,10)) | eval evidence_checklist=if(_nf>13,mvindex(_cols,13),"") | eval has_checklist=if(len(evidence_checklist)>0,1,0) | stats avg(evidence_reviewed_count) as avg_evidence_count avg(has_checklist) as pct_with_checklist by analyst | sort - avg_evidence_count

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | eval _cols=split(_raw,",") | eval confidence_score=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,6)) | eval trust_score=tonumber(mvindex(_cols,7)) | eval ai_recommendation_status=mvindex(_cols,9) | eval trust_confidence_gap=trust_score-confidence_score | stats avg(confidence_score) as avg_confidence avg(trust_score) as avg_trust avg(trust_confidence_gap) as avg_gap count as decisions by ai_recommendation_status | sort ai_recommendation_status

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | eval _cols=split(_raw,",") | eval _nf=mvcount(_cols) | eval timestamp=mvindex(_cols,0) | eval alert_id=mvindex(_cols,1) | eval analyst=mvindex(_cols,2) | eval supporting_evidence=if(_nf>14,mvindex(_cols,14),"") | eval contradicting_evidence=if(_nf>15,mvindex(_cols,15),"") | where len(supporting_evidence)=0 OR len(contradicting_evidence)=0 | table timestamp alert_id analyst supporting_evidence contradicting_evidence
index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" | spath input=_raw path=status output=status | stats count as steps by status | sort status

panel.title: Agentic workflow — avg duration by agent

search.query: index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" | spath input=_raw path=agent_name output=agent_name | spath input=_raw path=duration_ms output=duration_ms | eval duration_ms=tonumber(duration_ms) | stats avg(duration_ms) as avg_duration_ms by agent_name | sort - avg_duration_ms

index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" | spath input=_raw path=tools_used output=tools_used | where len(tools_used)>0 | eval tool=split(tools_used,"|") | mvexpand tool | stats count as uses by tool | sort - uses

index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" | spath input=_raw path=timestamp output=timestamp | spath input=_raw path=run_id output=run_id | spath input=_raw path=alert_id output=alert_id | eval _time=strptime(timestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | stats latest(_time) as last_step_time values(alert_id) as alert_id dc(agent_name) as agents by run_id | sort - last_step_time | head 20

index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" agent_name="MITRE ATT&CK Mapping Agent" | spath input=_raw path=alert_id output=alert_id | spath input=_raw path=mitre_techniques_flat output=mitre_techniques | spath input=_raw path=output_summary output=output_summary | where len(mitre_techniques)>0 | stats latest(output_summary) as summary values(mitre_techniques) as techniques count as mapping_runs by alert_id | sort - mapping_runs

index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" agent_name="MITRE ATT&CK Mapping Agent" | spath input=_raw path=timestamp output=timestamp | spath input=_raw path=run_id output=run_id | spath input=_raw path=alert_id output=alert_id | spath input=_raw path=status output=status | spath input=_raw path=tools_used output=tools_used | spath input=_raw path=output_summary output=output_summary | eval _time=strptime(timestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort - _time | table _time run_id alert_id status tools_used output_summary

index=trustops_agent_runs sourcetype="trustops:agent_step" | spath input=_raw path=run_id output=run_id | spath input=_raw path=agent_name output=agent_name | eval has_mitre=if(agent_name="MITRE ATT&CK Mapping Agent", 1, 0) | stats max(has_mitre) as mitre_mapping_present by run_id | stats count as runs sum(mitre_mapping_present) as runs_with_mitre_mapping | eval coverage_pct=round(100 * runs_with_mitre_mapping / runs, 1) | fields coverage_pct runs_with_mitre_mapping runs

index=trustops_decisions sourcetype="trustops:decision" | eval _is_header=if(match(_raw,"^timestamp,alert_id,analyst,"),1,0) | where _is_header=0 | fields - _is_header | rex field=_raw "^(?<timestamp>[^,]+),(?<alert_id>[^,]+),(?<analyst>[^,]+),(?<ai_recommendation>[^,]+),(?<analyst_decision>[^,]+),(?<final_severity>[^,]+),(?<confidence_score>\d+),(?<trust_score>\d+),(?<time_to_decision_seconds>\d+),(?<ai_recommendation_status>[^,]+),(?<evidence_reviewed_count>\d+),(?<sop_followed>[^,]+),(?<notes>[^\r\n]+)" | where alert_id="TO-VPN-2026-514" | eval _time=strptime(timestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort _time | table _time analyst ai_recommendation analyst_decision final_severity confidence_score trust_score time_to_decision_seconds ai_recommendation_status evidence_reviewed_count sop_followed notes
